page_content:
DANC299 Practicum in Choreography, Production and Performance II (1-3 Credits)

Continuation of DANC199.

Prerequisite: DANC199; or permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC304 Dance Education I: Foundations (3 Credits)

Organization and content of the studio dance class. Structuring developmentally appropriate dance experiences for students ages 3-18. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Dance department.
